settings.title:
Practical IoT for
Industry and Infrastructure

settings.editor: We design and deploy hardware-first IoT systems that integrate embedded electronics, automation, and cloud platforms to solve real operational challenges.

settings.html:
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.4/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/split-type"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {

  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

  document.querySelectorAll(".prod-heading").forEach(heading => {

    const h2 = heading.querySelector("h2");

    // Clean old split if exists (prevents glitch)
    if (h2.splitType) h2.splitType.revert();

    const split = new SplitType(h2, { types: "words" });
    h2.splitType = split;

    gsap.from(split.words, {
      scrollTrigger: {
        trigger: heading,
        start: "top 65%",
        toggleActions: "play none none none"
      },
      y: 40,
      opacity: 0,
      duration: 0.6,
      ease: "power3.out",
      stagger: 0.06,
      force3D: true,
      clearProps: "transform"
    });

  });

  // Wait till layout is stable
  setTimeout(() => {
    ScrollTrigger.refresh();
  }, 300);

});
</script>
